oai_dc:dc.dc:title: AFA Officers and Member Clubs
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Aviculture, American Federation of
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 46 Number 1 (2019).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.AMERICAN FEDERATION OF AVICULTURE® The Mission of the AFA is to Promote the Advancement of Aviculture Through Education.JAMIE WHITTAKER, President 281-217-0614 president@afabirds.orgGEORGIA HAYES, 2nd Vice President 713-816-9670 vp2@afabirds.orgClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
